issues.message: Gemini did not return a usable production intent.

actual.error:
Gemini structured output failed for intent: 1 validation error for ProductionIntent
  Invalid JSON: EOF while parsing an object at line 45 column 922 [type=json_invalid, input_value='{\n  "global_spec": {\n ...00000000000000000000000', input_type=str]
    For further information visit https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.13/v/json_invalid; raw='{   "global_spec": {     "outer_diameter": 20.0,     "wall_thickness": 2.0,     "is_hollow": true,     "units": "mm"   },   "start_position": [     0.0,     0.0,     0.0   ],   "start_axis": [     1.0,     0.0,     0.0   ],   "target_behavior": [     {       "goal_id": "straight_segment_1",       "depends_on_goal_ids": [],       "allow_parallel": false,       "type": "move",       "direction": "+X",       "length": 80.0     },     {       "goal_id": "inline_coupling",       "depends_on_goal_ids"'
